title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Kodathi Samaksham Balan Vakeel
subTitle: Balakrishnan, a lawyer, is not successful at his job due to his severe stammer. However, things begin to change when he is entrusted with a deeply complex case.

title: What the Fish
subTitle: Sudha hands over the responsibility of her house and pet fish to her niece's fiance before leaving for a holiday. When she returns, all seems fine until she opens the bathroom door.

title: Son Of Devil
subTitle: When a man rescues a woman from several thugs, who are harassing her, she falls in love with him. However, she is unaware of his dark past and deep secrets.

title: Ghayal Khiladi
subTitle: A young man from the slums uncovers his employer's widespread food adulteration. He then embarks on a determined battle to expose the truth and fight for societal well-being.

title: Arjun Reddy
subTitle: Arjun Reddy Deshmukh, a young surgeon with functioning alcoholism and a furious temper, spirals into self-destruction when he learns that his girlfriend is marrying another man.

title: Saamrajya
subTitle: A policeman who remains deeply tormented by his sibling's mysterious vanishing, undertakes a secret assignment to penetrate a powerful underworld organisation. He realizes that the ruthless chieftain is a person from his previous life.

title: Sindhubaadh
subTitle: Thiru, a small-time thief, embarks on a daring mission to Thailand to rescue Vendba, his wife, from a human trafficking gang.

title: Vikram Vedha
subTitle: Vikram, a pragmatic policeman, and his partner Simon are on the hunt to capture Vedha. When Vedha voluntarily surrenders, he offers to tell Vikram a story, throwing Vikram's life into disarray.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
subTitle: A brave thief fights to survive and claim his territory. However, he battles powerful enemies, aiming to become a leader without a real kingdom.

title: Petta
subTitle: In a bid to save his best friend's son Anwar, hostel warden Kaali goes against local goons. However, everything goes haywire when he is forced to face his past.

title: Petta
subTitle: In a bid to save his best friend's son Anwar, hostel warden Kaali goes against local goons. However, everything goes haywire when he is forced to face his past.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama embarks on an investigation into a missing person case, which leads her to uncover dark secrets hidden within the town. However, as she delves deeper, her past begins to haunt her.

title: House No. 13
subTitle: A family moves into a new home and experiences paranormal events. However, one by one, the family members start getting killed making the head of the family investigate the cause and stop the deaths.

title: Satya Gang
subTitle: Satya and Raj, who are orphans, own a garage and make a living out of it. However, their lives turn tragic when a notorious gang commit numerous murders and make them the culprits.

title: Pankh
subTitle: A young boy, dressed as a girl for a film, becomes famous. However, he struggles to break free from his breakout role after growing up, leading him to live a troubled life.

title: 1947: Earth
subTitle: A young Parsi girl discovers the truth about human nature as friends turn foes while the city is set aflame during partition.

title: Parking
subTitle: A parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views. Soon, the two men find themselves in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Anjaniputra
subTitle: A businessman saves a policeman from a group of thugs. As a result, he incurs the wrath of a ruthless local gangster who is also an assassin.

title: The Warrior
subTitle: After enduring a ruthless gangster's cruelty, a former doctor transforms into a police officer and returns to his city on a quest for justice.

title: Angel
subTitle: Nani discovers a rare antique idol from the excavation site at Amaravati. He wants to sell it and keep the money for himself, but before he can do that, the idol goes missing.

title: Main Hi Raja Main Hi Mantri
subTitle: A moneylender is living a happily married life. However, when his wife is insulted by the village sarpanch's wife, he focuses all of his energy on becoming a powerful politician.

title: Housefull 4
subTitle: Three brothers are set to marry three sisters. However, a peek into the distant past reveals to one of the brothers that their brides have been mixed up in their current reincarnation.

title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: Surya, a young man with anger issues, channels his emotions on Saturdays, because of a promise to his deceased mother. However, things get complicated when he decides to confront a corrupt cop.

title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: Surya, a young man with anger issues, channels his emotions on Saturdays, because of a promise to his deceased mother. However, things get complicated when he decides to confront a corrupt cop.

title: The Masterpiece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Bhoot
subTitle: Swati and Vishal move into a new flat that is haunted by the spirit of its previous tenant. Later, Vishal observes a sudden shift in Swati's behaviour.

title: Gollu Aur Pappu
subTitle: Two brothers, Gollu and Pappu, confront Gustaad Khan, a terrorist, for blowing up their garage. However, he decides to take advantage of their innocence by making them deploy a bomb in Ludhiana.

title: Shylock
subTitle: Prathapa, a producer, is indebted to Boss, a ruthless moneylender, but refuses to pay his dues. As a result, the latter decides to make his life miserable at every turn.

title: Indian Soldier Never On Holiday
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Kaala Karikalan
subTitle: Haridev Abhayankar, a corrupt minister, wishes to seize Dharavi's lucrative land for his own gain. However, Karikaalan, the locality's godfather, fights to protect his people's rights and assets.

title: Shootout at Wadala
subTitle: Manya, a diligent student, lands in prison for killing a gangster who attacked his brother, Bhargav, who eventually dies. Soon, Manya escapes jail and forms his own gang to seek revenge.

title: Seetharama Kalyana
subTitle: Arya, a righteous man, falls in love with a small-town woman named Geetha, unaware of the obstacles that lie ahead for both of them.

title: Bholaa Shankar
subTitle: A cab driver in Calcutta struggles to rebuild his life with his sister while confronting a haunting past. Subsequently, he fights to protect his future and family from the city's gritty underworld.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Gaalodu
subTitle: After fighting with a villager's son, Raju leaves for the big city, and there he meets Shukla, a nice woman from a rich family. However, this chance meeting could change Raju's life.
